title: Sync Console integrations to execute_tactus tool

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added Console UI support for execute_tactus evaluation envelopes: tool cards now detect evaluation calls via api_calls/value and render EvaluationToolOutput; added Jest coverage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verification complete on feature/plx-402e58-execute-tactus-integration. Dashboard Jest focused suite passed: ScoreChampionVersionTimeline, conversation-viewer streaming updates, and EvaluationTask category-filter. Python focused suite passed: execute_tactus runtime, agent primitives, chat recorder account/session handling, and ScoreChampionVersionTimeline backend tests.
